name: Chinasoft International Limited
summary: Chinasoft International Limited, together with its subsidiaries, develops and provides information technology (IT) solutions, IT outsourcing, and training services. It operates through Technical Professional Services Group and Internet IT Services Group segments. The company offers CloudEasy, a cloud management platform; Huaxia Cloud, a cloud brokerage platform; Tencent Cloud that provides cloud consultation, migration, operation and maintenance management, and application development and integration; enterprise cloud disk; and cloud shop O2O platform, as well as ResourceOne, TopLink/TSA+, and Ark big data middleware platforms. It also provides IT application development and maintenance, IT testing, infrastructure management, product development and services, digital consulting and implementation, system integration and services, IT consulting and outsourcing, business process outsourcing, and other customer services. In addition, the company offers Internet IT services comprising software industry Internet platform, SaaS, and shared services; and trades in software and hardware products. It serves financial institution, banks, insurance and securities, retail, telecommunications and Internet, high-technology business, manufacturing, transportation, public utilities, and other industries, as well as to the government in the People's Republic of China, the United States, Japan, Malaysia, India, and internationally. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China.
